channel.title: StageGlass Desktop Player
channel.description: Stable-channel updates for StageGlass Desktop Player.

item.title: DesktopPlayer 1.0.0
item.description:
StageGlass Desktop Player — 1.0.0

First signed, notarized, Sparkle-updating DesktopPlayer release.

  • Desktop prop playback in one app. Mac, Windows, Linux, and custom desktop skins ship from the unified DesktopPlayer target for laptop and monitor props.
  • Free-roam desktop foundation. The app includes the free-roam desktop pack runtime foundation for live background desktops and on-rails office screens.
  • NDI-ready macOS distribution. Bundles the DesktopPlayer NDI runtime dependency and ships as a Developer ID notarized DMG.
  • Sparkle updates. DesktopPlayer now has its own stable appcast and Check for Updates... command, separate from StageGlass Director.
